description: One who writes poetry; a crafter of words into rhythmic, meaningful forms. 'Weru' names who shapes language—finding the precise word for the precise feeling.
sound_symbolism: The word weaves with rhythm. 'We' flows with word-weaving, language shaped. 'Ru' runs with rhythmic flow, verse forming.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo weru' (the poet). Creates verse and song-words. Related to 'sulai' (musician) and 'lophae' (storyteller) as word-artist.

pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Poet as beauty-maker—language elevated to art.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Poet as truth-speaker—finding words for what lies beyond words.
